AgentShare.description: One slice of the install agent-distribution row.
AgentShare.title: AgentShare

CatalogFacets.description: Per-filter-option counts for the catalog filter sidebar.
CatalogFacets.title: CatalogFacets

DiffFile.description:
Per-file diff entry. `note` is set (and `hunks` empty) for binary /
not-stored / collapsed-oversize files that carry no renderable line body.
DiffFile.title: DiffFile

DiffHunk.description: A contiguous `@@ … @@` block of diff lines.
DiffHunk.title: DiffHunk

DiffLine.description: One rendered line of a unified diff.
DiffLine.title: DiffLine

DiffResponse.description: Line-level diff between two stored scan snapshots (HEAD-over-time).
DiffResponse.title: DiffResponse

DownloadInfo.description:
Pointer to the latest scan whose stored snapshot can be served as a zip.

Null on the item-detail response when no scan has a snapshot yet (the UI
falls back to the GitHub zipball). `byte_size` is the total stored snapshot
size, surfaced as the real download size in the install card.
DownloadInfo.title: DownloadInfo

InstallActivity.description: Anonymized install counts + agent distribution. No company-level data.
InstallActivity.title: InstallActivity

ItemDetailResponse.description: Full payload for the item-detail page.
ItemDetailResponse.title: ItemDetailResponse

ManifestSource.description: The primary public manifest file (SKILL.md / README) for the Source tab.
ManifestSource.title: ManifestSource

avg_latency_ms.description: Average scan latency in ms over completed scans.
avg_latency_ms.title: Avg Latency Ms

github_stars.description: Repo star count (cached proxy); null when unavailable.
github_stars.title: Github Stars

median_score.description: P50 aggregate score over completed scans.
median_score.title: Median Score

p95_latency_ms.description: P95 scan latency in ms over completed scans.
p95_latency_ms.title: P95 Latency Ms

rule_count.description: Active rubric rule count the engine loads.
rule_count.title: Rule Count

tier_distribution.description: Item count bucketed by latest-scan tier.
tier_distribution.title: Tier Distribution

PromoteRunResponse.description:
Structured 200 result of POST /scans/r/<token>/promote — never a 301.

`promoted` is True on the first (effective) promote, False on an idempotent
re-promote of an already-public run.
PromoteRunResponse.title: PromoteRunResponse

PromotedItem.description: One capability promoted from unlisted → public (D-UP-31).
PromotedItem.title: PromotedItem

RelatedItem.description: One card in the related-items grid.
RelatedItem.title: RelatedItem

RepoMeta.description: Public GitHub facts mirrored onto the item header + Package card.
RepoMeta.title: RepoMeta

ScanHistoryPoint.description: One point on the 90-day score-history line.
ScanHistoryPoint.title: ScanHistoryPoint

rescan.description: If true, bypass idempotency cache and queue a new scan.
rescan.title: Rescan

visibility.description: Listing posture. `public` (default) caches + appears in the catalog; `unlisted` never caches (nonce-salted), mints a share token, and is reachable only via its capability URL (I-3.5).
visibility.title: Visibility

ScanUploadResponse.description:
202 result of POST /api/v1/scans/upload (D-UP-06).

`slug` is populated once known for a public upload (or omitted until the run
completes — the FE polls the run report). `share_url` is the capability URL,
present ONLY for an unlisted upload.
ScanUploadResponse.title: ScanUploadResponse

VendorResponsePublic.description: A verified-vendor public response, surfaced next to findings.
VendorResponsePublic.title: VendorResponsePublic

VersionPoint.description:
One entry in the item's version-history rail (a scanned point in time).

`tag` is the GitHub release tag when resolvable, else null (the UI falls back
to the short ref SHA). `sub_scores` powers the per-category diff vs the
adjacent version. `scan_id` keys the on-demand `/diff` + `/download`
endpoints (ref_sha is NOT unique per item — a re-scan under a new
rubric_version reuses the SHA). `has_snapshot` is true only when this scan
persisted a file snapshot (pre-storage scans have none).
VersionPoint.title: VersionPoint

info.description: Every AI capability, independently scanned — public, free, Apache-2.0 trust-scoring for skills, MCP servers, hooks, and plugins.
info.title: SaferSkills API

get.description: Catalog list with the per-row latest-scan join + filters.

parameters.description: Provenance filter on the catalog item's source_kind. NOT named `source` (that is the scan TRIGGER enum) — P1-4.
parameters.name: artifact_source

schema.description: Provenance filter on the catalog item's source_kind. NOT named `source` (that is the scan TRIGGER enum) — P1-4.
schema.title: Artifact Source

parameters.description: Include low/empty quality_tier items (default hides them — D-04-19).
parameters.name: showLowQuality

schema.description: Include low/empty quality_tier items (default hides them — D-04-19).
schema.title: Showlowquality

get.description:
Line-level diff between two stored scan snapshots of the same item.

Both scans must belong to `slug`; `from` defaults to the scan just older
than `to`. 404 if either snapshot is absent (a pre-storage scan). The diff
is CPU-bound, so it runs in a worker thread off the event loop.

Serve a stored scan snapshot as a SaferSkills-built `.zip`.

Default target is the latest scan with a snapshot. Per-IP daily rate cap
(loopback-exempt, cf. `scans.py::_is_loopback`) + a snapshot-size cap guard
the anonymous endpoint. Snapshots are immutable → far-future `Cache-Control`.

parameters.description: scan_id; default = latest with a snapshot
parameters.name: scan

schema.description: scan_id; default = latest with a snapshot
schema.title: Scan

get.description:
Slim summary list of repo scan RUNS (one row per repo scan, not per
capability — a multi-capability repo would otherwise flood the feed).
Findings count sums across the run's per-capability scans.

post.summary: Submit a public GitHub URL for scanning.

delete.description:
Delete an unlisted run + everything it owns (ordered cascade). Only
unlisted runs are token-deletable (public → generic 404). Token → 404.
delete.summary: Delete an unlisted run by its capability-URL token.

get.description:
View an unlisted run via its share token. Invalid / expired / deleted /
not-unlisted ALL → generic 404 (no oracle). A promoted (now public) run
307-redirects to the run report.
get.summary: Read an unlisted scan report by its capability-URL token.

get.description:
Token-gated `.zip` of an unlisted run's scanned bytes (mockups 4 keep the
download). Same generic-404 / `private_lookup` cap / anti-leakage contract as
the view route — the public `/items/<slug>/download` 404s for shadow rows, so
unlisted bytes are reachable only here. Bytes come from the storage-split
resolver (`upload_files` for unlisted uploads).
get.summary: Download the scanned bytes (.zip) of an unlisted run by its token.

post.description:
Promote unlisted → public, one-way. Returns a structured 200 (never a 301).
Idempotent: an already-public run returns `promoted=False`.
post.summary: Promote an unlisted run to public (one-way).

get.description:
The repo scan surface: consolidated repo score + by-kind tally + one row
per discovered capability (each its own catalog item) with its findings.
get.summary: Read the full repo scan report (all discovered capabilities) for a run ID.

post.description:
Upload one file, one `.zip`, or N loose files (combined ≤10 MiB) → scan it
like a repo.

The upload is a second front-end to the unchanged engine: extraction yields
the same in-memory file index a GitHub fetch produces. Shares the `scan_submit`
per-IP daily bucket (loopback exempt). `visibility` defaults to `public`.
post.summary: Submit an uploaded artifact for scanning.

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream of repo-scan progress (re-keyed onto the run).

Wire format: each event is `{event_seq, stage, completion_pct, status,
payload, timestamp}` JSON. Clients pass `Last-Event-ID: <run_id>-<seq>`
to resume — we replay `scan_events` rows for the run whose `event_seq > seq`,
then subscribe to LISTEN on `scan_progress_<run_id>` for live deltas.
get.summary: SSE progress stream for a repo scan run.
Read the full scan report for a single capability scan ID.

post.description: Handle GitHub push/repository/ping webhooks for the skills repo.

schema.title: Response Github Webhook Webhooks Github Post
